title: nvme-cli bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.13-2.0.1]
- Enable nvmefc-boot-connections service on install [Orabug: 37506870]

[2.13-2]
- Disable PDC at compile time (RHEL-97516)

[2.13-1]
- Update to version 2.13
full_text:
[2.13-2.0.1]
- Enable nvmefc-boot-connections service on install [Orabug: 37506870]

[2.13-2]
- Disable PDC at compile time (RHEL-97516)

[2.13-1]
- Update to version 2.13
